description: BYD SEAL is an all-electric sedan with ocean-inspired aesthetics, featuring CTB technology and exceptional performance.
BYD SEAL Flagship AWD with dual motors, 3.8s 0-100 km/h acceleration.
BYD ATTO 3 is a compact electric SUV with 420km range, featuring the signature rotating display.
BYD ATTO 3 Plus trim with enhanced features.
BYD HAN EV luxury sedan with dual motors, 521km range.
BYD DOLPHIN - affordable electric hatchback with 340km range.
BYD DOLPHIN Premium with 60.4kWh battery and 427km range.
BYD SEALION 7 - premium electric SUV with Nappa leather, 523HP, 482km range.
BYD SHARK 6 - plug-in hybrid pickup with DMO off-road system, 2500kg towing.
BYD SEAL 7 DM-i - plug-in hybrid sedan with 850km combined range, DM-i Gen 4.0.
BYD SEAL 7 DM-i AWD with 4.8s acceleration.
BYD SONG PLUS DM-i - plug-in hybrid SUV with 890km combined range.
BYD SONG PLUS EV - electric SUV with 520km range.
BYD QIN PLUS DM-i - efficient plug-in hybrid sedan with 795km range.
BYD E2 - affordable electric hatchback with 405km range.
BYD YUAN PLUS - electric SUV with 510km range.
BYD SONG L - electric SUV coupe with 550km range.
BYD SONG L Performance with 4.5s acceleration and 662km range.
BYD Leopard 5 (Fang Cheng Bao) - Chinese-spec grey market import via QatarSale. Petrol hybrid SUV.
BYD Leopard 7 - Chinese-spec grey market import via QatarSale. Petrol hybrid SUV.
BYD Leopard 8 Flagship - Chinese-spec grey market import. Premium SUV with 6 seaters, 21 inch rims.
BYD Denza B5 - plug-in hybrid off-road SUV with 1000km range, 790mm wading depth.
BYD Denza B8 - luxury plug-in hybrid SUV with 905km range, 890mm wading depth.
BYD Denza N9 Flagship - Chinese-spec grey market import via QatarSale.

The GAC AION Y Plus is a fully electric suv offering 430 km of range
and 204 horsepower. It features modern electric vehicle technology with advanced battery systems,
comfortable interior with premium features, and comprehensive safety systems.

The GAC AION S Plus is a fully electric sedan offering 500 km of range
and 204 horsepower. It features modern electric vehicle technology with advanced battery systems,
comfortable interior with premium features, and comprehensive safety systems.

The GAC AION LX Plus is a fully electric suv offering 600 km of range
and 408 horsepower. It features modern electric vehicle technology with advanced battery systems,
comfortable interior with premium features, and comprehensive safety systems.

The GAC AION V is a fully electric suv offering 400 km of range
and 224 horsepower. It features modern electric vehicle technology with advanced battery systems,
comfortable interior with premium features, and comprehensive safety systems.

The GAC AION ES is a fully electric sedan offering 350 km of range
and 136 horsepower. It features modern electric vehicle technology with advanced battery systems,
comfortable interior with premium features, and comprehensive safety systems.
Chery eQ7 - Pure electric SUV with 512km range, 67.12kWh LFP battery. Grey market import from China.
Chery eQ7 Base - 412km range with 53.87kWh battery. Grey market import.
Chery Tiggo 8 Pro e+ - Plug-in hybrid SUV with 75km electric range and 1000km combined range. Official GCC spec available via Elite Motors.

Chery QQ Ice Cream - Small urban EV with 170km range. Grey market import from China.
Chery QQ Ice Cream Base - 120km range with 9.42kWh battery. Grey market import.
Jaecoo J7 Summit PHEV - Plug-in hybrid SUV officially launched by Silver Lake Motors Qatar. 1.6L turbo with electric motor.
Jaecoo J7 EX+ AWD - Turbocharged petrol SUV with AWD. Official GCC spec.
Jaecoo J7 FWD - Entry-level turbocharged SUV with FWD.
Jaecoo J5 Premium - Compact hybrid SUV with excellent cargo capacity. Official GCC spec from Silver Lake Motors.
Jaecoo J8 Flagship - Premium SUV officially launched by Silver Lake Motors Qatar.
Omoda C5 1.5T Basic - Entry-level crossover SUV with 1.5L turbo engine. Official GCC spec available.
Omoda C5 1.6T Sport - Sport trim with more powerful 1.6L turbo engine.
Omoda C5 Flagship - Top trim with premium features and 1.6L turbo engine.
Omoda S5 GT Luxury - Sporty sedan with 1.6L turbo engine. Available via official and grey market channels.
Omoda S5 GT Standard - Entry-level sport sedan with 1.5L turbo engine.
Omoda 5 Luxury - Chinese-spec grey market import via QatarSale. Compact crossover SUV.
Chery Tiggo 8 Pro Max AWD - Flagship SUV with 2.0L turbo engine. Official GCC spec from Elite Motors.
Chery Tiggo 8 Pro - Mid-size SUV with 1.6L turbo engine.
Chery Tiggo 7 Pro Max - Compact SUV with premium features.
Chery Tiggo 7 Pro - Compact SUV with 1.5L turbo engine.
Chery Tiggo 4 Pro - Subcompact SUV with 1.5L turbo engine.
Chery Arrizo 6 Pro - Compact sedan with 1.6L engine.
Chery Arrizo 5 - Subcompact sedan with 1.5L turbo engine.
MG ZS EV Long Range - Affordable electric SUV with 440km range, 72.6kWh LFP battery, and competitive pricing.
MG 4 EV Standard Range - Rear-wheel drive electric hatchback with 365km range.
MG 4 EV Long Range 64 kWh with 465km range and 140kW DC charging.
MG 4 EV XPower - High-performance dual-motor version with 435HP, 3.8s acceleration. Grey market import from UAE/China.
MG HS Hybrid+ Deluxe - Plug-in hybrid SUV with 1287km combined range, 85km electric only.
MG HS Hybrid+ Luxury trim with premium features.
MG EHS PHEV - Plug-in hybrid SUV similar to HS Hybrid+ but different styling/marketing.
Geely Geometry C GS 53 kWh - Electric SUV crossover available through UAE imports. 400km range, 201HP.
Geely Geometry C GF 70 kWh Long Range - Extended range version with 485km WLTP range.
Geely Monjaro - Flagship SUV with 2.0L turbo engine, AWD, and premium features. Officially available in Qatar.
Geely Tugella GF - Performance SUV coupe with sporty styling.
Geely Tugella GF+ - Enhanced trim level.
Geely Tugella GF+ BR - Premium trim with brown interior package.
Geely Emgrand - Entry-level sedan, most affordable Geely in Qatar.
Geely Coolray Comfort - Compact SUV with turbocharged engine.
Geely Starray - Mid-size SUV.
Geely Galaxy L6 EM-i - Advanced plug-in hybrid sedan with 1370km total range. Grey market import.
Geely Galaxy L7 PHEV - Plug-in hybrid SUV competing with BYD Song Plus DM-i. Grey market only.

features: Competitor to BYD Song Plus DM-i

description: Haval H6 2.0T Supreme - Mid-size SUV with 2.0L turbo engine, officially available in Qatar through GWM.
Haval H6 2.0T Premium 4WD - Top-spec version with 4WD system.
Haval H6 Hybrid - Hybrid version available in UAE, can be imported to Qatar through grey market.
GWM ORA 03 Pro - Retro-styled electric hatchback with 420km range. Officially available in Qatar.
NETA V - Compact electric SUV from Hozon Auto. NOTE: NETA Motors has halted production, raising concerns about warranty and spare parts support in the GCC. Limited availability in UAE.
NETA U 54.34 kWh - Larger electric SUV. WARNING: Production halted due to manufacturer financial issues.
Voyah FREE 106 kWh - Premium electric SUV from Dongfeng with 680km range, 490HP dual motor, luxury features. Officially available in Qatar.
Voyah FREE REEV - Range extender version with 1357km combined range. Available through UAE imports.
Avatr 11 Ultra Range AWD - Premium electric SUV with Huawei technology, 680km range, triple LiDAR, 240kW charging. Officially available in Qatar through Elaf Auto.
Avatr 12 Gran Coupe - Futuristic luxury gran coupe with scissor doors, Huawei AI technology, 700km range. Available through UAE imports.
